sqlMap.select:
select ID as FILEURL, FILENAME, MIME_TYPE, FILE_SIZE, to_char(create_date,'yyyy-mm-dd') as create_date from ctp_file where ID = #id#
FILENAME like '%' || #name# || '%'

select file_url as fieldid ,to_char( ca.createdate,'yyyy-mm-dd') as createdate from ctp_attachment ca left join $formName$ f1 on f1.id = ca.att_reference where ca.sub_reference = $fieldName$
ca.sub_reference IN
#attachIds[]#
order by $sort$

select id, filename,file_url,mime_type, attachment_size,to_char(createdate,'yyyy-mm-dd') as createdate from ctp_attachment where 1=1
sub_reference = #attachId#
FILENAME like '%' || #name# || '%'

select count(*) from ctp_attachment ca left join $formName$ f1 on f1.id = ca.att_reference where ca.sub_reference = $fieldName$
ca.sub_reference IN
#attachIds[]#
sqlMap.insert: insert into ctp_attachment (ID, ATT_REFERENCE, SUB_REFERENCE, CATEGORY, TYPE, FILENAME, FILE_URL, MIME_TYPE, CREATEDATE, ATTACHMENT_SIZE, DESCRIPTION, GENESIS_ID, SORT, SECRET_LEVEL) values (#id#, #formId#, #subId#, #category#, #type#, #fileName#, #fileUrl#, #mimeType#, to_date(#createDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd'), #fileSize#, null, null, 0, null )
sqlMap.delete:
delete ctp_attachment ca where 1=1
ca.file_url = #fileId#
ca.sub_reference = #attachId#
sqlMap.select: select * from doc_resources dc where dc.fr_name = #frName# and dc.parent_fr_id = #parentId#
sqlMap.insert: insert into doc_resources (ID, DOC_LIB_ID, FR_NAME, FR_DESC, FR_TYPE, FR_ORDER, PARENT_FR_ID, FR_SIZE, SOURCE_ID, IS_FOLDER, SUBFOLDER_ENABLED, COMMENT_ENABLED, COMMENT_COUNT, ACCESS_COUNT, CREATE_USER_ID, CREATE_TIME, LAST_USER_ID, LAST_UPDATE, STATUS, STATUS_DATE, LOGICAL_PATH, MIME_TYPE_ID, IS_CHECK_OUT, CHECK_OUT_USER_ID, CHECK_OUT_TIME, KEY_WORDS, HAS_ATTACHMENTS, IS_LEARNING_DOC, MIME_ORDER, THIRD_HASPINGHOLE, VERSION_ENABLED, VERSION_COMMENT, PIGEONHOLE_TYPE, SOURCE_TYPE, RECOMMEND_ENABLE, RECOMMEND_COUNT, COLLECT_COUNT,DOWNLOAD_COUNT,SCORE_COUNT, TOTAL_SCORE, FAVORITE_SOURCE, OPEN_SQUARE_TIME, IS_PIGEONHOLE_ARCHIVE) values (#id#, #docLibId#, #frName#, #frDesc#, #frType#, #frOrder#, #parentFrId#, 0, null, 1, 1, 1, 0, 0, #createUserId#, sysdate, #createUserId#, sysdate, 2, sysdate, #logicPath#, #frType#, 0, null, null, null, 0, 0, #mimeOrder#, 0, 0, null, null, null, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, null, sysdate, 0)

insert into doc_resources (ID, DOC_LIB_ID, FR_NAME, FR_DESC, FR_TYPE, FR_ORDER, PARENT_FR_ID, FR_SIZE, SOURCE_ID, IS_FOLDER, SUBFOLDER_ENABLED, COMMENT_ENABLED, COMMENT_COUNT, ACCESS_COUNT, CREATE_USER_ID, CREATE_TIME, LAST_USER_ID, LAST_UPDATE, STATUS, STATUS_DATE, LOGICAL_PATH, MIME_TYPE_ID, IS_CHECK_OUT, CHECK_OUT_USER_ID, CHECK_OUT_TIME, KEY_WORDS, HAS_ATTACHMENTS, IS_LEARNING_DOC, MIME_ORDER, THIRD_HASPINGHOLE, VERSION_ENABLED, VERSION_COMMENT, PIGEONHOLE_TYPE, SOURCE_TYPE, RECOMMEND_ENABLE, RECOMMEND_COUNT, COLLECT_COUNT,DOWNLOAD_COUNT,SCORE_COUNT, TOTAL_SCORE, FAVORITE_SOURCE, OPEN_SQUARE_TIME, IS_PIGEONHOLE_ARCHIVE) values (#id#, #docLibId#, #frName#, #frDesc#, #frType#, #frOrder#, #parentFrId#, #frSize#, #frSource#, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, #createUserId#, sysdate, #createUserId#, sysdate, 2, sysdate, #logicPath#, #frType#, 0, null, null, null, 0, 0, #mimeOrder#, 0, 0, null, null, null, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, null, sysdate, 0)
sqlMap.select: select min(fr_order) as FRMIN from doc_resources dc where dc.doc_lib_id = #docLibId# and dc.parent_fr_id = #parentFrId#
select field0001 as IP, field0002 as PORT, field0003 as USR, field0004 as PSSW, field0005 as TYPE from formmain_1115 where field0006=#id#

select id, field0001 as connectValue, field0002 as fileName, field0003 as filePath, field0004 as fileState, field0006 as typeId, field0007 as connectType, field0009 as tableName, field0008 as connectField, field0010 as fieldName , START_MEMBER_ID from formmain_0909 where field0004=2620725725532802393
id in (#id#)
sqlMap.update: update formmain_0909 set field0004=#fileState#, field0005=#remark# where id=#id#
sqlMap.select: select id from doc_resources where fr_desc = #fr_desc#
sqlMap.insert: insert into doc_acl ( ID, USER_ID, USER_TYPE, SHARETYPE, OWNER_ID, SDATE, EDATE, DOC_RESOURCE_ID, IS_ALERT, DOC_ALERT_ID, LEN_POTENT, ACL_ORDER, POTENT,doc_POTENT ) values ( util_common.getAbsID,#user_id#, #user_type#, '1', '0',#startdate#,#enddate#,#doc_resources_id#, '0', '', '-1', '0', '0011100','0110000100' )
sqlMap.select: select distinct(c.file_url) as fieldId from ctp_attachment c where c.sub_reference = #sub_reference#
select distinct(c.file_url) as fieldId from ctp_attachment c where c.sub_reference = #attachmentId# and c.att_reference = #colSummaryId#
sqlMap.update: update doc_resources set acl_create_time=sysdate where id=#doc_resources_id#
sqlMap.select: select f.id as "id",f.att_reference "attReference",f.sub_reference "subReference",f.file_url "fileUrl",f.filename "fileName" from ctp_attachment f where f.sub_reference = #refId#
